scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @compushare/control-plane lint && pnpm --filter @compushare/provider-runtime lint && pnpm --filter @compushare/dashboard lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @compushare/control-plane typecheck && pnpm --filter @compushare/provider-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @compushare/dashboard typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @compushare/control-plane test && pnpm --filter @compushare/provider-runtime test && pnpm --filter @compushare/dashboard test
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @compushare/control-plane format && pnpm --filter @compushare/provider-runtime format && pnpm --filter @compushare/dashboard format
scripts.format:check: pnpm --filter @compushare/control-plane format:check && pnpm --filter @compushare/provider-runtime format:check && pnpm --filter @compushare/dashboard format:check
